# Reluctant Board Member

A working director of a small BC worker co-op. Deep governance knowledge,
little patience for software: joined the board out of duty, does director
work in stolen half-hours, and abandons any flow that hides the
director-level action behind jargon or ordinary-member framing. Needs
board/director-scoped actions (approvals, resolutions, filings) surfaced
plainly, with an obvious next step and proof the action was recorded.
